listings.title: Samsung Radiant360 R3 Black Wireless Speakers (X2)
listings.body: Selling a pair of these speakers that work perfectly and are in excellent condition. There can work with Bluetooth or with internet in separate rooms. They sound fantastic!

listings.title: Dehumidifier
listings.body: Apollo Dehumidifier. Removes excess moisture from the air. Provides much needed comfort and relief in humid environments. Prevents mold and mildew. Great for house, basement, apartment, etc. Cost effective, easy to use, reliable. On casters, rolls easily. It will do an excellent job for you! Moving, must sell. Asking $75 OBO Make an offer!

listings.title: Frigidaire Dehumidifier
listings.body: Frigidaire Dehumidifier in excellent condition. Model No. FFAP5033W1 Energy efficient. Like new. $150.- Compare to https://www.homedepot.com/p/Frigidaire-50-pt-1200-sq-ft-High-Humidity-Dehumidifier-with-Built-in-Pump-and-Bucket-in-White-FFAP5034W1/325191989

listings.title: 2 Large Vintage Silver Beaded Snowflake Ornaments 10” high
listings.body: 2 Large Vintage Silver Beaded Snowflake Ornaments 10” high 8” across. Some beading has come loose please review photos.
